summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar 1976 show featuring a blistering Help On The Way > Slipknot! > Franklin’s Tower and standout Cosmic Charlie.
review: Fans rave about this June‑14‑1976 performance, calling the second set a “brick house” with highlights like Cosmic Charlie, The Music Never Stopped and an almost‑14‑minute Help On The Way > Slipknot! > Franklin’s Tower. Betty Cantor’s soundboard tape is praised for crystal‑clear Jerry vocals and a well‑balanced mix that even surprised listeners who expected a bad recording.

ai_rating.rationale: All six reviews are highly positive, emphasizing both an outstanding performance (especially the second set) and superb Betty‑Cantor soundboard quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear Jerry Garcia vocal tone, Donna Godchaux well‑mixed, no noticeable dropouts; Betty Cantor’s engineering praised for fidelity and balance.

standout_songs: Help On The Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as a tightly‑woven, psychedelic ‘brick house’ that captures the 1976 summer tour vibe; overall pacing and song transitions receive high marks.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His voice is highlighted as beautiful and clear on this tape; guitar tone praised implicitly through overall performance praise.
